groups.title: US market risk appetite
groups.thesis: Broad US risk-on/risk-off movement changes appetite for new SaaS spending, AI tooling, and experimental product bets.
groups.productImplication: When broad US growth/risk appetite weakens, prioritize immediate ROI, cost control, and evidence-backed buyer proof over speculative new surfaces.

quotes.name: Nasdaq 100 ETF
quotes.role: US growth and AI software beta

groups.title: US AI infrastructure bellwethers
groups.thesis: AI infrastructure equities are a fast proxy for whether the market is rewarding compute, chips, cloud, and model-platform expansion.
groups.productImplication: Strength supports AI-infra and agent-evaluation narratives; weakness pushes High Signal toward cost control, proof, and practical workflow value.

groups.title: International AI supply chain
groups.thesis: International semiconductor and platform bellwethers show whether AI demand is broadening outside US mega-cap narratives.
groups.productImplication: When international AI supply-chain names move together, High Signal should look for cross-border supply, policy, and capex signals before recommending market-intelligence builds.
